metadata.description: RevOS data-engineering Agent Skills: build and explore the lakehouse, author dbt transformations, define Cube.dev semantic models, and query them — all from your coding agent.

plugins.name: data-engineering
plugins.description: End-to-end RevOS data-engineering workflow as Agent Skills: connect sources, load sample data, explore the BigQuery lakehouse, author dbt silver/gold transformations, define Cube.dev semantic models, and query or visualize them.
